description: Domain-neutral default profile. Uses citation footnotes [N] with References section. No hard threshold on groundedness. Suitable for any moderately important multi-step task.

bootstrap.description: Read the saga task.json so the worker knows the goal and current stage.
Read progress.json to see what is already done.
Read the most recent checkpoint, if any, to resume context.

hard.title: Goal addressed
hard.passDescription: the artifact directly answers the stated deliverable
hard.failReworkDescription: goal is partially addressed; more work would help
hard.failEscalateDescription: the goal is ambiguous or self-contradictory and cannot be resolved without human input

hard.title: Self-contained
hard.passDescription: a reader who didn't see the chat can understand the output
hard.failReworkDescription: output assumes chat context; can be made self-contained in rework
hard.failEscalateDescription: the output depends on ephemeral state that cannot be captured

hard.title: Done-criteria match
hard.passDescription: the worker's claimed done-criteria match the original plan (no scope drift)
hard.failReworkDescription: minor scope drift detected; can be corrected in rework
hard.failEscalateDescription: the plan's criteria are contradictory and cannot all be satisfied

soft.title: Completeness
soft.scoringGuide: 5 = all declared criteria met; 1 = major gaps

soft.title: Clarity
soft.scoringGuide: 5 = clear and self-contained; 1 = requires original chat

criteria.description: All declared done-criteria are satisfied with evidence.
criteria.scoringGuide: 5 = every criterion has direct evidence; 1 = most criteria are unsupported.

criteria.description: Claims use citation footnotes [N] with References section.
criteria.scoringGuide: 5 = all claims have footnotes or [citation needed] markers; 1 = significant unsourced narration.

criteria.description: Output is structured and a successor worker could resume from it.
criteria.scoringGuide: 5 = self-contained handoff; 1 = requires the original chat to make sense.

benchGoal.goal: Sort a list of 10 strings alphabetically and write the result to output.txt, one per line.
